summary: User Education System Phase 2 testing complete. All 3 main features (Interactive Onboarding Tour with Driver.js, Smart Suggestions, Celebration Moments) verified working correctly. Tour has 7 steps with dark violet theme, auto-starts for new users, shows progress (X of 7), and marks completion in localStorage. SmartSuggestion shows contextual tips, is dismissible, and CTA buttons work. CelebrationModal shows with confetti for milestone achievements.
passed_tests: Frontend: Onboarding tour auto-starts for new users (localStorage 'onboarding_tour_complete' not set) - VERIFIED
Frontend: Tour has 7 steps - Welcome, Create Project, Pipeline, Portfolio, Calendar, Help, All Set - ALL 7 VERIFIED
Frontend: Tour has dark theme (.kolor-tour-popover with background rgb(26,26,26), border-radius 16px) - VERIFIED
Frontend: Tour shows progress (step X of 7) - VERIFIED (shows '1 of 7', '2 of 7', etc.)
Frontend: Tour has Next/Back/Close buttons - VERIFIED
Frontend: Tour marks completion in localStorage after finishing - VERIFIED (onboarding_tour_complete='true')
Frontend: data-tour='add-lead' exists on Add Lead button - VERIFIED
Frontend: data-tour='kanban-board' exists on Kanban container - VERIFIED
Frontend: data-tour='view-portfolio' exists on Portfolio view button - VERIFIED
Frontend: data-tour='view-calendar' exists on Calendar view button - VERIFIED
Frontend: data-tour='help-button' exists on Help button wrapper - VERIFIED
Frontend: SmartSuggestion renders contextual tip (suggestion-send-quote for users with leads but no quotes) - VERIFIED
Frontend: SmartSuggestion has dismiss button (X) and stores dismissal in localStorage - VERIFIED
Frontend: SmartSuggestion CTA button 'View Projects' works - VERIFIED
Frontend: CelebrationModal renders with confetti and achievement content when triggered - VERIFIED
Frontend: CelebrationModal shows 'First Project Created!' with emoji and message - VERIFIED
Frontend: CelebrationModal has close button (data-testid='celebration-close') with text 'Awesome!' - VERIFIED
Frontend: Help Panel has 'Restart Tutorial' button (data-testid='help-restart-tour') - VERIFIED
Frontend: Clicking Restart Tutorial clears localStorage and starts tour - VERIFIED
Frontend: AddLeadModal shows InlineHint for project type (data-testid='hint-seen_project_type_tip') - VERIFIED
Frontend: Driver.js custom theme CSS (.kolor-tour-popover) is loaded - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: OnboardingTour.tsx correctly implements driver.js with 7 well-defined steps targeting appropriate elements
Tour popover uses custom class 'kolor-tour-popover' for theming, CSS is properly defined in index.css
SmartSuggestion.tsx implements priority-based contextual tips with correct condition logic (e.g., send-quote shows when leadCount > 0 && !hasQuotes)
CelebrationModal.tsx uses react-confetti for visual celebration effect
checkCelebration helper function in CelebrationModal.tsx properly checks and sets localStorage to prevent duplicate celebrations
Dashboard.tsx correctly integrates all 3 components with proper state management
Tour auto-start logic (useEffect with 1.5s delay) in Dashboard.tsx works correctly
Help Panel properly passes startTour function to enable restart functionality
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Celebration Test Client lead for testing CelebrationModal (should be deleted)
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Education Phase 2 complete. Key data-testids: help-restart-tour (in HelpPanel footer), suggestion-{id} (e.g., suggestion-send-quote), suggestion-cta-{id}, suggestion-dismiss-{id}, celebration-modal, celebration-content, celebration-close, hint-seen_project_type_tip. Tour uses data-tour attributes: add-lead, kanban-board, view-portfolio, view-calendar, help-button. localStorage keys: onboarding_tour_complete, celebrated_first_project, suggestion_{id}_dismissed. To test tour: clear 'onboarding_tour_complete' from localStorage. To test celebration: clear 'celebrated_first_project'. SmartSuggestion conditions: first-project (leadCount=0), send-quote (leads>0 && !hasQuotes), portfolio-upload (leads>=3 && !hasPortfolio), first-contract (leads>=2 && hasQuotes && !hasContracts), complete-profile (!hasStudioName).
